summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TradeLife Next.js app. Core classification logic works locally but critical integration issues prevent external API access. All onboarding flows work perfectly.

critical_bugs.endpoint: All API routes via external URL
critical_bugs.issue: 502 Bad Gateway - APIs not accessible via public URL https://tradelife-dashboard.preview.emergentagent.com/api/*
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot classify transactions - core functionality broken
critical_bugs.details: APIs work locally (localhost:3000) but fail with 502 through external URL. Frontend shows 'The preview environment is not responding' error.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 'Failed to save transactions' error when saving to Supabase
critical_bugs.details: Supabase tables may not exist or have permission issues

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 'Failed to save rule' error when saving user classification rules
critical_bugs.impact: User learning preferences cannot be saved
critical_bugs.details: Supabase tables may not exist or have permission issues

working_endpoints.status: Working perfectly - hardcoded rules + AI classification

integration_issues.issue: Connect Bank button clicks but classification results never appear due to API 502 errors
Review page shows 'No transactions to review' because it cannot fetch data via external API

passed_tests: All onboarding flows (Sole Trader, Limited Company, Not set up yet)
Business type selection and conditional step logic

action_item_for_main_agent.critical_priority: Fix external API routing - 502 errors preventing frontend from accessing /api/* endpoints. This breaks core transaction classification functionality.
high_priority: Create or fix Supabase database tables (transactions, user_rules) for data persistence
Verify Supabase credentials and table permissions in .env.local
action_item_for_main_agent.details: The app works locally but users cannot access it via the public URL due to API routing issues. All API endpoints return 502 'The preview environment is not responding' when accessed externally.

success_percentage.backend: 50% - Core logic works but external access broken
success_percentage.frontend: 90% - UI perfect but integration blocked by API issues
success_percentage.overall: 30% - Critical functionality unusable by end users
